# Aetheris Innovations
> Elevating Industry through Intelligent Automation.

We automate manual workflows for Logistics, Manufacturing, and Construction using AI, RPA, and Custom Engineering.

## Core Products
- **Aetheris Flow**: Zero-touch automation protocol. Extracts data from PDFs/Docs and enters it into ERPs. 
  - Link: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-flow/
- **Aetheris Scale**: Marketing automation. AI outreach and lead scoring.
  - Link: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-scale/
- **Aetheris Build**: Custom enterprise engineering. Spring Boot, Microservices, RAG/LLM Apps, React/Native.
  - Link: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-build/

## Company Info
- **Mission**: Remove human error and operational drag.
- **Leadership**: Frezer Kifle (Lead Full Stack), Natnael Menamo (Lead Frontend).
- **Security**: Enterprise Grade, GDPR/SOC2 Compliant.
